prompt: Exquisite 3D embroidery style illustration, bas-relief fiber art effect, pure "silk white + milk white" base color, delicate silk thread texture. The scene features several small birds perched on winding flower branches, adorned with pinkish-white, light peach, coral pink, and pale gold flowers and leaves. The composition is light and elegant with ample negative space. The birds' feathers are rendered with milk-white, light blue, pale pink, and light gold silk thread embroidery. The flower branches are slender and natural, with layered stitching on the flowers, creating a high-end handcrafted embroidery, silk pile work, soft lighting, rich detail, and a gentle, fresh artistic effect.
